companies.name: Microsoft Sri Lanka
companies.reason: Microsoft has strengthened its partnership with Sri Lanka, committing to enhance the local tech ecosystem through its cloud and AI technologies. This initiative is a part of a broader strategy to drive digital transformation in the country.

companies.name: WSO2
companies.reason: The integration platform company WSO2 was recently acquired by Swedish private equity firm EQT for $600 million, marking a significant milestone and indicating growing international interest in Sri Lankan tech companies.

companies.name: hSenid Mobile Solutions
companies.reason: Recognized as a leader in enterprise AI solutions, hSenid Mobile Solutions is launching new AI-driven products aimed at enhancing business efficiencies, positioning it as a key player in the evolving technology landscape in Sri Lanka.
